memoryArtifacts.description:
Marguerite de Male dite Marguerite de Dampierre (13 avril 1350 - 16 mars 1405), comtesse de Flandre, d'Artois et de Bourgogne.

Elle fut deux fois duchesse consort de Bourgogne, et suo jure, héritière …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite III de Flandre Comtesse de Flandre於1350年4月13日出生在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫辛吉可盧易斯時，她的父親Louis II de Flandre19歲，母親Margaretha van Brabant27歲。她於1369年6月19日與Philippe II de Bourgogne Duc de Bourgogne在法國瑟-吉瓦朋托結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1405年3月16日在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯享年54歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德利勒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite III de Flandre Comtesse de Flandre于1350年4月13日出生在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫辛吉可盧易斯时，她的父亲Louis II de Flandre19岁，母亲Margaretha van Brabant27岁。她于1369年6月19日与Philippe II de Bourgogne Duc de Bourgogne在法国瑟-吉瓦朋托结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1405年3月16日在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯享年54岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德利勒。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Flandre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite III de Flandre Comtesse de Flandre was born on 13 April 1350, in Sint-Kruis, West Flanders, Belgium, her father, Louis II de Flandre, was 19 and her mother, Margaretha van Brabant, was 27. She married Philippe II de Bourgogne Duc de Bourgogne on 19 June 1369, in Pontoise, Seine-et-Oise, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 16 March 1405, in Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 54, and was buried in Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite III de Flandre Comtesse de Flandre est née le 13 avril 1350, à Sint-Kruis, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, son père, Louis II de Flandre, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margaretha van Brabant, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Philippe II de Bourgogne Duc de Bourgogne le 19 juin 1369, à Pontoise, Seine-et-Oise, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 mars 1405, à Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite III de Flandre Comtesse de Flandre am 13. April 1350 in Sint-Kruis, West-Flandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Louis II de Flandre 19 und ihre Mutter Margaretha van Brabant 27. Sie hat am 19. Juni 1369 in Pontoise, Seine-et-Oise, Frankreich Philippe II de Bourgogne Duc de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. März 1405 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite III de Flandre Comtesse de Flandre è nata il il 13 aprile 1350 nel Sint-Kruis, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio, sua padre, Louis II de Flandre, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Margaretha van Brabant, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Philippe II de Bourgogne Duc de Bourgogne il 19 giugno 1369, nel Pontoise, Seine-et-Oise, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 16 marzo 1405, nel Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite III de Flandre Comtesse de Flandreが1350年4月13日にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンシント-クルイスで生まれた時，父Louis II de Flandreは19歳，母Margaretha van Brabantは27歳であった。1369年6月19日にフランスセアイネ-エト-オイゼポントイゼでPhilippe II de Bourgogne Duc de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1405年3月16日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスアラスで54歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードリルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite III de Flandre Comtesse de Flandre(이)가 1350년 4월 13일 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 신트-크루이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Louis II de Flandre(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaretha van Brabant(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1369년 6월 19일 프랑스 세이인-트-이스 폰토이스에서 Philippe II de Bourgogne Duc de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1405년 3월 16일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 아라스에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 릴에 묻혔다.

mn.13 April 1350–16 March 1405: 1350 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 13–1405 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 16

pt.13 April 1350–16 March 1405: 13 de abril de 1350–16 de março de 1405
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite III de Flandre Comtesse de Flandre nasceu em 13 de abril de 1350, em Sint-Kruis, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica, seu pai, Louis II de Flandre, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Margaretha van Brabant, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Philippe II de Bourgogne Duc de Bourgogne em 19 de junho de 1369, em Pontoise, Seine-et-Oise, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de março de 1405, em Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite III de Flandre Comtesse de Flandre родилась 13 апреля 1350 г. в местности синт-круиз, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Louis II de Flandre было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaretha van Brabant, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philippe II de Bourgogne Duc de Bourgogne 19 июня 1369 г. в местности понтоис, сине-ет-оис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 16 марта 1405 г. в местности аррас, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности лилл, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.13 April 1350–16 March 1405: 13 de abril de 1350–16 de marzo de 1405
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite III de Flandre Comtesse de Flandre nació el 13 de abril de 1350, en Sint-Kruis, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica, su papá, Louis II de Flandre, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Margaretha van Brabant, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Philippe II de Bourgogne Duc de Bourgogne el 19 de junio de 1369, en Pontoise, Seine-et-Oise, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 16 de marzo de 1405, en Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
